# PERF-207 negative: c.SendFile with cache headers set in the same handler
lang: go
file: PERF-207-safe.go
variant: framework
---
package sample

import "github.com/gofiber/fiber/v2"

func Handle(c *fiber.Ctx) error {
	c.Set("Cache-Control", "public, max-age=3600")
	c.Set("ETag", "v1")
	return c.SendFile("./public/index.html")
}
